prompt: 帮我做一段 30 秒的视频：一个宇航员漂浮在空间站内，透过舷窗看到地球日出。前半段是空间站内的失重环境，后半段是地球日出的壮观景象。横屏 2.35:1，科幻史诗风格，8K品质。

assertions.name: two_segments
assertions.check: response.md contains '第1段' and '第2段' or segment markers

assertions.name: video_extension_pattern
assertions.description: Uses '将@视频1延长' pattern for segment 2
assertions.check: response.md contains '将@视频1延长' for second segment

assertions.name: timestamp_per_segment
assertions.check: response.md contains time segments in both segments

assertions.name: connection_points
assertions.description: Includes connection point descriptions between segments

assertions.name: quality_anchoring
assertions.description: Uses epic structure with quality anchoring (品质锚定)
assertions.check: response.md contains '品质锚定' or engine/VFX quality specs

assertions.name: atmosphere_coherence
assertions.description: Includes atmosphere coherence statement (大气连贯声明)
assertions.check: response.md contains coherent atmosphere description throughout

assertions.name: light_shadow_structure
assertions.description: Includes light/shadow three-layer structure (光影三层)
assertions.check: response.md contains light source, behavior, and tone descriptions

assertions.name: closing_statement
assertions.check: response.md contains closing summary statement about mood/tone
